evals.name: move-dotenv-to-vault
evals.prompt: I've got a bunch of secrets sitting in plaintext in my .env and we already run HashiCorp Vault. Can you move them into Vault and swap the values in the file for references?
evals.expected_output: Agent uses the migrate-secrets skill: confirms the Vault CLI is authenticated, dedups by value, asks the leaked-check question before storing, stores each value via stdin (not argv), and replaces the literals in .env with vault references. Does not attempt to rotate or provision Vault.

assertions.text: Treats this as a migrate-secrets task (store in an existing vault + replace references), not a scan or rotation task
Confirms the target backend (Vault) is installed and authenticated before storing
Stores values via stdin or file (e.g. value=- piped), not as a literal command-line argument
Asks whether any value has been committed/pushed/exposed before storing, and points to rotating first if so
Replaces each literal with a vault reference and removes the plaintext
Does not rotate the secrets itself and does not try to provision/create the vault

evals.name: leaked-value-warning
evals.prompt: This AWS key has been in our public GitHub repo for months. Just stick it in AWS Secrets Manager so the app stops hardcoding it.
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes the value is already leaked (public repo) and warns that storing the same value relocates a burned secret — it should be rotated first (pointing at the scan-secrets remediation doctrine) — but does not hard-block; it offers to vault as-is if the user insists.

assertions.text: Warns that a publicly-exposed value is compromised and that vaulting the same value does not un-leak it
Recommends rotating first and points to the scan-secrets remediation doctrine for the rotation flow
Does not hard-refuse — offers to proceed and vault as-is if the user chooses

evals.name: negative-scan-not-migrate
evals.prompt: Can you check this repo for any hardcoded secrets?
evals.expected_output: Agent routes to scan-secrets (detection), not migrate-secrets. migrate-secrets is for moving known secrets into a vault, not finding them.

assertions.text: Treats this as a scan-secrets / detection task, not a migrate-secrets task
Does not start moving values into a secrets manager
